title: chamaecrista lineata var. banesensis
intro: Chamaecrista lineata var. banesensis is a plant species commonly known as a type of sensitive plant, known for its ability to fold its leaves in response to touch or environmental stimuli. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, exhibiting antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit anti-cancer properties. Chamaecrista lineata var. banesensis can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to fully understand its potential applications and effects.
